title: Keeb Quest: Typing Battles
description:
Keeb Quest is a full-fledged typing game that turns practice into an adventure. Use your keyboard to battle enemies and bosses, explore branching stories, learn touch typing through structured lessons, and track your improvement across multiple modes. Build speed, accuracy, and confidence - then see how far you can go. 

Features and Game ModesClassic Mode

Fight through escalating waves of enemies. Every five rounds, choose your next boss from a random pair. Runs last around 8-12 minutes. 

Boss Survival

Endless challenges across five distinct boss types: Paragraph, Falling Words, Word Grid, Dialogue, and Line Rush. Or take on Gauntlet, a nonstop run through every boss type in sequence. 

Adventure Mode

A relaxed, no-pressure mode where you type through branching stories and shape the narrative with your choices. Choose your path and discover multiple endings at your own pace. 

Academy

Targeted typing drills to sharpen the skills you'll need. Practice weak keys, build speed, and warm up before a run. A full curriculum with 140 lessons is available to teach you touch typing from beginning to end. Take on challenge lessons and chapter bosses to put your skills to the test.

Track Your ProgressPer-key heatmaps, WPM curves, accuracy grades, high scores, and achievements. Review session history to spot trends, identify weak keys, and watch your speed climb over time. Compete on leaderboards against friends and the global player base.

Every Keystroke CountsWhether you're looking to improve your typing speed or just want a fun way to practice, Keeb Quest turns every keypress into an adventure.
description_short: Keeb Quest turns typing practice into an adventure. Type to defeat enemies and bosses, explore branching stories, and sharpen your speed and accuracy across a variety of game modes. Every keypress counts as you chase high scores and discover how far your typing can take you.
